title: Invoisio Invoice Payment Contract Schema
description: Machine-readable schema for the invoice-payment Soroban contract. Generated from Rust types — do not edit manually. Re-generate with: make schema

Asset.description: Asset type: native XLM or a Stellar-issued token.

oneOf.title: Token
oneOf.description: Stellar-issued token identified by code and issuer.

PaymentRecord.description: On-chain snapshot of a single recorded invoice payment.

invoice_id.description: Unique invoice identifier (e.g. invoisio-abc123). Matches the native Stellar Payment memo.

payer.description: Stellar account address (G...) that sent the payment.

amount.description: Payment amount in the asset's smallest unit (stroops for XLM; 7-decimal units for USDC). Must be > 0.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) sourced from the ledger at recording time.

ContractMeta.description: Version metadata stored on-chain alongside state.

storage_schema_version.description: Storage layout version. Increment when persistent storage keys or shapes change.

AllowlistMode.description: Asset allowlist policy for this contract instance.

native_allowed.description: Whether native XLM payments are accepted.

requires_token_allowlist.description: Whether issued assets must be explicitly allowlisted. Currently always true.

ContractConfig.description: High-level configuration snapshot returned by config(). Single permissionless call for ops/clients.

oneOf.description: Admin Stellar account address once initialised.

InvoicePaymentRecorded.description: Emitted by record_payment(). Primary indexer event — carries the full payment details.

payer.description: Stellar account address of the payer.

asset_issuer.description: Asset issuer address; empty string for native XLM.

amount.description: Payment amount in smallest denomination. Must be > 0.

AssetAllowlisted.description: Emitted by allow_asset(). Signals a token was added to the allowlist.

AssetRevoked.description: Emitted by revoke_asset(). Signals a token was removed from the allowlist.

NativeAllowChanged.description: Emitted by set_allow_native(). Signals the XLM allowance flag changed.

allowed.description: New value of the native XLM allow flag.

AlreadyInitialized.description: initialize() called on an already-initialised contract.

PaymentAlreadyRecorded.description: record_payment() called with an invoice_id that was already recorded.

PaymentNotFound.description: get_payment() called for an invoice_id with no record.

InvalidAsset.description: asset_code empty, or non-XLM asset supplied without asset_issuer.

AssetNotAllowed.description: Asset not in the admin-controlled allowlist.

has_payment.description: Return true if a payment exists for invoice_id.
